Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Bayesian statistics for confused data scientists 25 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. Show HN: Termcraft – terminal-first 2D sandbox survival in Rust 75 upvotes, 9 comments
  3. Mamba-3 272 upvotes, 50 comments
  4. Common Lisp Development Tooling 28 upvotes, 2 comments
  5. ZJIT removes redundant object loads and stores 68 upvotes, 10 comments
  6. Electronics for Kids, 2nd Edition 80 upvotes, 13 comments
  7. The paddle wheel aircraft carriers of Lake Michigan 31 upvotes, 3 comments
  8. Floci – A free, open-source local AWS emulator 25 upvotes, 2 comments
  9. Boomloom: Think with your hands 12 upvotes, 0 comments
  10. How Ford burned $12B in Brazil (2021) 11 upvotes, 0 comments
  11. Some things just take time 469 upvotes, 150 comments
  12. Attempts to post the latest Trivy security incident have been marked [dead] 47 upvotes, 9 comments
  13. Meta's Omnilingual MT for 1,600 Languages 112 upvotes, 31 comments
  14. Professional video editing, right in the browser with WebGPU and WASM 87 upvotes, 23 comments
  15. Hide macOS Tahoe's Menu Icons 77 upvotes, 20 comments
  16. Grafeo – A fast, lean, embeddable graph database built in Rust 175 upvotes, 57 comments
  17. Show HN: Atomic – self-hosted, semantically-connected personal knowledge base 34 upvotes, 7 comments
  18. Do Not Turn Child Protection into Internet Access Control 364 upvotes, 149 comments
  19. Hawaii's worst flooding in 20 years threatens dam, prompts evacuations 54 upvotes, 19 comments
  20. Storing 2 bytes of data in your Logitech mouse 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  21. Tinybox- offline AI device 120B parameters 243 upvotes, 136 comments
  22. The Impact of AI on Game Dev Jobs. Open to Work Crisis 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  23. Thinking Fast, Slow, and Artificial: How AI Is Reshaping Human Reasoning 83 upvotes, 48 comments
  24. A Japanese glossary of chopsticks faux pas (2022) 454 upvotes, 351 comments
  25. How Invisalign became the biggest user of 3D printers 128 upvotes, 93 comments
  26. Seam carving with forward energy 8 upvotes, 2 comments
  27. No evidence cannabis helps anxiety, depression, or PTSD 134 upvotes, 111 comments
  28. Ubuntu 26.04 Ends 46 Years of Silent sudo Passwords 303 upvotes, 305 comments
  29. Show HN: Joonote – A note-taking app on your lock screen and notification panel 38 upvotes, 29 comments
  30. No Semicolons Needed 33 upvotes, 35 comments
